title: Spicy Thai Eggplant Curry
description: A flavorful and spicy Thai curry made with eggplant, gored and other ingredients. Perfect for a quick dinner.

ingredients.name: Thai red curry paste
ingredients.notes: Make sure to choose a gluten-free paste

ingredients.name: Fish sauce
ingredients.notes: Can be substituted with soy sauce for vegan option

instructions: Heat oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add Thai red curry paste and cook for 1 minute.
Add Gored and cook until it starts to soften.
Add eggplant and cook until it starts to soften.
Pour in coconut milk and stir to combine.
Add fish sauce, brown sugar, and red pepper.
Bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and let it cook for 10-15 minutes.
